com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc

Interface IXObjectDataGenerator

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXGenerator, IXPlugin

    public interface IXObjectDataGenerator
extends IXGenerator
    An interface for implementing custom links for a given design object while generating a package within Capital Publisher.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Map<java.io.File,java.lang.String> generateObjectData(IXPackagerContext context, IXObject ixObject)
      Called once for every design object within the chosen package scope.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • generateObjectData

        java.util.Map<java.io.File,java.lang.String> generateObjectData(IXPackagerContext context,
                                                                IXObject ixObject)

        Called once for every design object within the chosen package scope. This method should return a collection of Files and Display Strings. Links will automatically be created from the object to the set of Files returned, the display name will be used in the generated package UI as a means to navigate from the object to the File.

        For Example: 

                        HashMap m = new HashMap();
                if (ixObject instanceof IXConnector) {
 
        
                        File f = new File("c:\MyDocuments\ConnectorPinInfor.pdf");
                        m.add(f, "Connector Pin Information");
 
        
                        f = new File("c:\MyDocuments\ConnectorPartInfo.html")
                        m.add(f, "Connector Part Information");
                }
 
        
           return  m;
        Parameters:
        context - Packager context containing project scope and links to resources area
        ixObject - design object which is currently being processed
        Returns:
        Map of File to the display name
